screens.title: You Used a Lever Today (and Didn't Notice)
screens.content:
When you opened a door, you used a lever. When you opened a can of soda with a pull-tab, you used a lever. When you pried open a stuck lid with a spoon, you used a lever.

A lever is humanity's oldest machine — invented thousands of years ago — and your robot needs to understand it to be strong.

Archimedes said: "Give me a lever long enough and a fulcrum on which to place it, and I shall move the world."
